/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/play_song.dir/examples/play_song.cpp.o -o play_song  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cat_robot/src/ros2_ws/build/libcreate libcreate.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
